title: Edgard Cooper Natural Cat Treats, Chicken Pillows (1 X 60G Bag), Packed With Fresh Meat, Grain Free Treats For Rewarding, Less Than 2Kcal Per Treat, Natural Ingredients & No Added Sugar
features: Natural cat treats, packed with fresh salmon, no over processed or dried meat
Suitable for all adult neutered or non-sterilized cats over the age of 6 months, as part of a balanced diet
Less than 2kcal per treat, with no added sugar or artitficial nasties
Fulfill all your cat’s desires with our dedicated treats. Make sure not to exceed the recommended daily amount indicated on the packaging. Always ensure your cat has access to fresh water

Reward your cat with our irresistible stuffed treats. Did they spare the couch today? Well done! Did they cooperate getting into the carrier for the trip? Perfect! These Stuffed Treats are just the reward they deserve.
description: From the manufacturer How many treats should I feed my cat? Treats should not make up to more than 10% of your cat’s daily diet. You can find the feeding guidelines of our treats on the back side of the packaging or on the image carousel above. Do the cat treats contain added sugar? Absolutely not! Our treats are made with your cat’s health in mind, so we never add any sugar to our recipes. We believe that treats should be both delicious and nutritious without any unnecessary additives. Can I give the cat treats to my kitten? Treats can be offered to cats as from 6 months old. What ingredients are used in the cat treats? We only use fresh (or frozen) meat and fish, as well as nutritious offal, as protein sources instead of meat meals or protein concentrates. This high-quality protein source is essential for your cat's health and also makes our treats super tasty. Previous page Crunchies Playtime just got better with our delicious Crunchies. These tasty treats add fun and flavour to every playful moment and are ideal for pairing with puzzle toys, keeping your cat’s mind sharp. Shop Rolls Toss, roll and watch the chase unfold, satisfying your cat's natural instinct to hunt. These high in meat treats contain 86% meat or fish and are packed with protein to fuel their every pounce. Shop Pillows With a crunchy outside and a soft, creamy center, these treats offer a surprising texture that your cat won't be able to resist. Packed with fresh, meat and natural ingredients—no added sugar. Shop Next page

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎For ultimate flavour and freshness, store our Pillows in their original packaging in a cool, dry place, and reseal tightly. Once opened, ideally use within 3 months.

product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: EN Complementary pet food for cats 6 months+. Composition: pea starch*, chickpeas* (dried), fresh salmon* 14 %, chicken fat*, sweet potato* (dried), pea protein*, lignocellulose*, chicken gravy, minerals*. Additives: Technological additives: antioxidants. *Natural. Analytical constituents: crude protein 16.5%, crude fat 18%, crude fibre 5.5%, crude ash 6.2%. Best before/batch number/approval number: see bottom of pack. Make sure fresh water is available. Keep in a cool, dry place. 378 kcal/100g. GRAIN-FREE RECIPE.
